message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[1, 2, 5.0], [2, 4, 5.0], [1, 3, 5.0], [3, 4, 5.0]]","[[\"shortest_path\", 1, 4, 0], [\"add_edge\", 1, 4, 12.0], [\"add_edge\", 4, 1, 8.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 4, null], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 4, 15.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 4, 10.0], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 4, 5.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 4, 10.0], [\"remove_edge\", 1, 2, 0], [\"connectivity_check\", 1, 4, 0]]"],"focus":"Canonical edge merging (multiple add_edge calls), capacity filtering vs demand, lexicographic tie-break between equal-cost paths, and removal that leaves an alternate path."},{"input_lines":["[[1, 2, 3.0], [2, 3, 4.0]]","[[\"shortest_path\", 3, 3, null], [\"connectivity_check\", 2, 2, 0], [\"remove_edge\", 1, 3, 0], [\"update_weight\", 2, 3, 1.5], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 3, 0], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 2, 2.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 3, 3.0], [\"add_edge\", 1, 3, 10.0], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 3, 5.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 3, 3.0]]"],"focus":"u==v special-case queries, no-op remove of non-existent edge, weight update, capacity-based path invalidation, then adding a direct edge and enabling it by setting capacity."},{"input_lines":["[[1, 2, 5.0], [1, 10, 5.0], [2, 100, 5.0], [10, 100, 5.0], [2, 3, 1.0], [3, 100, 9.0]]","[[\"shortest_path\", 1, 100, 0], [\"remove_edge\", 2, 100, 0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 100, 0], [\"add_edge\", 1, 100, 8.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 100, null], [\"add_edge\", 1, 100, 12.0], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 100, 4.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 100, 5.0], [\"update_capacity\", 1, 100, 5.0], [\"shortest_path\", 1, 100, 5.0]]"],"focus":"Large node IDs, tie-breaking between symmetric equal-cost routes, add_edge canonical min-weight behavior, capacity toggling that enables/disables the direct shortcut."}]}
